# Platform Core

Use this map to understand the platform decisions before diving into customer-specific material.

## Core Documents
- [[Knowledge Base/Documents/Platform Core/Digital Employee Platform PRD|Digital Employee Platform PRD]] - Defines Ruh.ai as a horizontal digital employee operating system built on OpenClaw, including the core product thesis, trust-boundary model, and go-to-market shape.
- [[Knowledge Base/Documents/Platform Core/Employee Pack Specification|Employee Pack Specification]] - Defines the reusable pack format, validation rules, deployment lifecycle, and governance contract for digital employees.
- [[Knowledge Base/Documents/Platform Core/System Design and MVP Execution Blueprint|System Design and MVP Execution Blueprint]] - Translates the PRD into a V1 architecture, control-plane/runtime split, collaboration model, and phased implementation sequence.
